name: kimi-ui-workflow
description: Run bounded frontend and UI tasks through kimi-cli and return structured results.

interface.shortDescription: Route bounded frontend and UI edits through kimi-cli with structured results
interface.longDescription: Use Kimi UI Workflow to hand frontend and UI tasks to the local kimi CLI while limiting editable files, passing focused repo context, and returning stable JSON summaries for Codex to inspect.
defaultPrompt: Use Kimi UI Workflow to refine the layout in these React files
Apply a focused frontend UI change only inside the listed files
Route this Tailwind interface update through kimi-cli and summarize the result
